products.name: Vitamin C Glow Serum 3
products.tagline: Brighter skin in 7 days — or your money back.
products.description: Our Vitamin C Glow Serum is a high-potency brightening formula packed with 20% pure Vitamin C, hyaluronic acid, and niacinamide. Visible results in just 7 days.

problem.title: Struggling with dull, uneven skin?
problem.body: Many Nigerian women deal with hyperpigmentation, dark spots from sun exposure, and an uneven skin tone. Most products are either too harsh, too expensive, or simply don't work for our skin type.

solutions.title: Fades dark spots
solutions.body: 20% Vitamin C breaks down melanin clusters, visibly reducing dark spots within 2 weeks.

solutions.title: Deep hydration
solutions.body: Hyaluronic acid locks in moisture all day, leaving skin plump and dewy — not greasy.

solutions.title: Protects against damage
solutions.body: Antioxidant-rich formula shields skin from pollution and UV damage daily.

features: 20% Pure Vitamin C — maximum brightening strength
Hyaluronic Acid for all-day deep hydration
Niacinamide to tighten pores and smooth texture
Works on all Nigerian skin tones

faq.q: How soon will I see results?
faq.a: Most customers notice brighter skin within 7–14 days. Full results in 4–6 weeks.

faq.a: Yes! Tested for melanin-rich skin tones. No risk of bleaching.
Apply 3–4 drops to clean, dry skin every morning before moisturiser and SPF.

faq.a: Full refund within 14 days. Just WhatsApp us with your order details.

products.name: Global Blood Pressure Monitor
products.tagline: Know your numbers. Protect your health.
products.description: Clinical-grade upper-arm BP monitor with large LCD display, 60-reading memory, irregular heartbeat detection, and WHO risk classification. Accurate to ±2mmHg.

problem.title: Hypertension is Nigeria's #1 silent killer.
problem.body: Over 35% of Nigerian adults have high blood pressure and most don't know it. Unmonitored hypertension leads to strokes, kidney failure, and heart attacks.

solutions.title: Track daily from home
solutions.body: Monitor your BP every day. Catch dangerous spikes before they become emergencies.

solutions.title: Irregular heartbeat alert
solutions.body: Automatically detects irregular heartbeat patterns during measurement.

features: WHO blood pressure risk colour classification
Large backlit LCD — easy to read
